_comment: Curated MCP subset for `vk code` (vaked-aegis/oracle local dev). Daily-earners only: crabcc (symbol index over the vakedc/vakedz source), context7 (Nix/Zig/eBPF/MCP docs), github (PR/issue ops). Dropped vs the project .mcp.json: workspace-fs (redundant with native file tools), playwright (web-only), repowise (add on-demand for big refactors). Used with `claude --strict-mcp-config --mcp-config tools/dogfood/mcp.dev.json`.

crabcc.description: Symbol index for AI agents — sym/refs/callers/outline/fuzzy/grep over the repo index (build/refresh via `crabcc index`). Structured JSON, far cheaper than grep -rn.

context7.description: Focused docs lookup for Nix, Zig, MCP, eBPF, libbpf, raylib, and related ecosystem docs.

github.description: GitHub repo, issues, PRs, and docs. Write actions require operator approval.
